title: Something funny I noticed in the AU scenes
display_title: Something funny I noticed in the AU scenes
wikitext:
[]: Something funny I noticed in the AU scenes...             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Mon Oct 28, 2013 12:49 pm So, as we all know, Shinji is, shall we say, not very good when it comes to girls. However, I noticed something funny in a still shot from episode 26: Hang on, what's this? Let's zoom in... Is that...Mana Kirishima? Well, obviously at this quality it's hard to tell who it is, and most likely it's just a generic girl, but the similarity is amusing. Also, Shinji with a provocative picture of a pretty girl...this is a first. So, yeah. That was...interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Oct 28, 2013 1:35 pm Well, that's an Alternate Universe, were Shinji got a normal upbringing and so is a normal teenage boy. He showed that same "interest" for the other sex in his encounter with Rino, when he related to Toji and Kensuke that he only could have a slight peek at her panties, and of course when the trio got to the window to see Misato arriving! You'll also notice that his room is way less tidy than in canon universe, where he was bordering on the neat freak, since he wasn't raised by a teacher(which we could assume was strict), or maybe since he doesn't that a complex of inferiority and a fear of uselessness, he doesn't feel the urge to have his room completely clean and tidy to not be a burden to whoever is housing him(thanks to living with his parents) Makes you see how things would have been different have those fuckers from SEELE never existed! EDIT : I also noticed : the shirt hanging at the top-right of the image is the same that the one he whore during THE kitchen scene! Foreshadowing from Anno? I wouldn't put that past him!

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Oct 28, 2013 2:02 pm I think it's more because the shirt from the kitchen scene is taken straight from what he was wearing in late episode 15. Also, note that the room is filled with all sorts of personal paraphernalia - 14 year's worth of it, since in this universe, he's presumably lived there since he was little because his parents work there. The most mentionable thing is probably not the random pr0n, but the fact that the Cello is on display - It must've taken some effort to completely hide that hobby from Misato and Asuka untill ep 15, and still get regular practice. Alt!Shinji seems more open about it.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Mon Oct 28, 2013 5:41 pm I saw that the other day. It looks like it's at least supposed to resemble the Misato cleavage picture, to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Oct 28, 2013 5:57 pm Shinji's a teenage boy. Boys are into boobies. Therefore, Shinji is obviously into boobies.

[]:             Quote Post by Violet Shadow » Mon Oct 28, 2013 6:01 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Shinji's a teenage boy. Boys are into boobies. Therefore, Shinji is obviously into boobies.

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Mon Oct 28, 2013 6:27 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Shinji's a teenage boy. Boys are into boobies. Therefore, Shinji is obviously into boobies.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Mon Oct 28, 2013 6:34 pm Butts are a tantalizing alternate option.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Oct 28, 2013 6:52 pm I made a mistake. Boys are into boobies or the butt, that better? Gender doesn't matter for the latter

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Oct 28, 2013 8:13 pm Isn't it a wonder how all humans have butts? It gives me hope that maybe we're not all that different after all...

[]:             Quote Post by Violet Shadow » Tue Oct 29, 2013 1:39 am Girlfriend of Steel was released in 1998... did they already have the character concept for Mana? Because that looks incredibly like her.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Oct 29, 2013 2:31 am Looks like this to me: [wkimg:2l4e1c17]01_C020_big.jpg[/wkimg:2l4e1c17]

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Oct 29, 2013 2:49 am @Ornette The woman in that other photo clearly has shorter hair than Misato, though....

[]:             Quote Post by SimplyMason0 » Tue Oct 29, 2013 5:49 am Looks like Maya to me. Mana has more redder hair while Maya and photogirl has just brown hair. Which is odd considering she looks like an adult female Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Tue Oct 29, 2013 6:07 am SimplyMason0 wrote: Looks like Maya to me. Mana has more redder hair while Maya and photogirl has just brown hair. Which is odd considering she looks like an adult female Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Oct 29, 2013 6:20 am I don't know how anyone could possibly use the adjective "Clearly" for this image . We just know the hair isn't hanging down in front, it could be tied back, or just behind her. And from the non-super-blurry-fullsize-picture, the bangs even look kind of similar. It's obviously not the same postcard that was given to him from a different continuity. But Mana's hair is not the same color and Maya's hair seems too short .

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Oct 29, 2013 6:21 am I wonder why Shinji's hiding a picture of a girl from Asuka. You'd think that if he were in a serious and honest relationship with said girl in the picture that it would be on top of his bookshelf in a neat little frame or something, not taped behind the books somewhere. riffraff11235 wrote: @Ornette The woman in that other photo clearly has shorter hair than Misato, though....

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Oct 29, 2013 7:29 am The skin tone is too dark for Misato or Maya. In fact, it reminds me of Nadia. Quite appropriate, considering that Shinji was based off her! Oh, and nice find!

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Oct 29, 2013 8:15 am Well, there is a shadow casted over the photo, so that might have something to do with the darker skin tone. (Even with the shadow her skin is still not quite as dark as Nadia's, though.) Still doesn't look like Misato or Maya to me either. I've never played any GF of Steel, but judging from pics online, I'd say both her and this shelf lady look just as generic as one another. Or it could be someone the layout artist was dating. Or maybe a relative. Sometimes Easter Eggs only are recognizable by the creative team involved, and aren't meant for the viewer to recognize.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Oct 29, 2013 11:43 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I wonder why Shinji's hiding a picture of a girl from Asuka. You'd think that if he were in a serious and honest relationship with said girl in the picture that it would be on top of his bookshelf in a neat little frame or something, not taped behind the books somewhere.
